name: ApplicationDescription
description: ApplicationDescription schema from Amazon Elastic Beanstalk AWS Elastic Beanstalk API

ApplicationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the application.

DateCreated.description: The date when the application was created.

DateUpdated.description: The date when the application was last modified.

Versions.description: The names of the versions for this application.

ConfigurationTemplates.description: The names of the configuration templates associated with this application.

ResourceLifecycleConfig.description: The lifecycle settings for the application.
